name: LendNation
description_short: Moore, OK's LendNation location at 531 SW 4th St provides payday and title loans with same-day service.
description_long:
LendNation's Moore, OK branch sits on SW 4th Street in the heart of Moore's business district, providing a dedicated storefront for residents needing quick cash solutions. The location is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 5 PM, making it convenient for local workers and business owners during standard business hours. This standalone LendNation location serves Moore residents with both payday loans and auto title loans in a professional, accessible setting.

At this Moore storefront, LendNation offers payday advances for immediate cash needs and auto title loans for those with vehicle equity. The on-site team can guide you through the application process and explain repayment options tailored to your situation. For questions or to discuss your loan needs, call the Moore branch directly at 405-794-0305.

If you're a Moore resident facing an unexpected expense or short-term cash gap, bring a valid ID, proof of income (recent paystubs or bank statements), and details about any vehicle if you're interested in a title loan. LendNation processes applications quickly, often completing loans the same day. The team at this location understands Moore's local lending needs and works to make the process straightforward.
pros: Instant debit card funding option allows same-day cash access without waiting for bank deposits
Multi-pay installment loans extend repayment up to 36 months with flexible payment schedules (bi-weekly, semi-monthly, monthly)
200+ physical locations across 11 states plus online lending provides accessibility for in-person and remote borrowers
Pre-approval decisions provided instantly after online application submission
Title loan option allows borrowing against vehicle equity while keeping the car; may offer lower rates and longer terms than payday loans
Check cashing and money order services available at locations for additional financial services
Strong customer satisfaction: 4.8/5 Google rating from 161 reviews at San Antonio location
Extended business hours (9 AM–6 PM weekdays, 9 AM–1 PM Saturday) increase accessibility
cons: High-cost debt: Payday loans and title loans typically carry APRs that far exceed 36%, making them expensive compared to personal loans or credit alternatives
Short default terms on payday loans (typically due at next payday) create significant repayment pressure and risk of rollover debt cycles
State-specific availability means products, rates, and terms vary widely; consumers may find limited options or higher costs in their state
Title loan risk: Using vehicle as collateral means default can result in vehicle repossession, threatening transportation access
Installment loans up to 36 months, while longer-term than payday loans, still carry rates substantially higher than traditional bank loans or credit unions
best_for: Borrowers facing unexpected expenses with immediate cash needs (medical emergencies, car repairs, utility bills) who need same-day or next-day funding
Vehicle owners with poor credit seeking collateral-based loans with potentially lower rates than payday alternatives
Individuals who prefer in-person lending and want to discuss loan options face-to-face with local loan officers
Borrowers who need flexibility beyond traditional payday terms and can handle 36-month installment repayment schedules
diagnosis: LendNation is best suited for borrowers in a financial emergency who prioritize speed and convenience over cost, have reliable income to repay, and either lack access to traditional credit or need funds faster than banks provide. The critical caveat is that payday and title loans are high-cost debt solutions; borrowers should explore credit union PALs, employer advances, or personal loans first, as these typically carry substantially lower rates and represent safer financial choices for emergency needs.
services: Payday loans ($100-$1,000 short-term loans due at next payday)
Multi-pay installment loans (up to 36 months; bi-weekly, semi-monthly, or monthly payments)
Title loans (secured by vehicle; available for cars, trucks, motorcycles, boats, ATVs, RVs depending on state)
Title installment loans (longer-term title loans with scheduled payments)
Online payday loans (apply online with instant pre-approval)
Instant debit card funding (same-day cash access)
meta_description: LendNation at 531 SW 4th St, Moore, OK. Fast payday and title loans with same-day service.
